chargedcharms.configuration.absorptionch: Number of charges for the Charged Absorption Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.absorptionco: Cooldown in seconds for the Charged Absorption Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.absorptiondu: Duration in seconds for the Charged Absorption Charm effect.
chargedcharms.configuration.airremaining: Amount of air remaining when Charged Water Breathing Charm is triggered.
chargedcharms.configuration.charms.descr: Enable or disable individual Charged Charms.
chargedcharms.configuration.charms.name: Enable/Disable Charms
chargedcharms.configuration.disableabsor: Set to true/on to disable Charged Absorption Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disableencht: Set to true/on to disable Charged Enchanted Totem Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disableglowu: Set to true/on to disable Charged Glow Up Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disableregen: Set to true/on to disable Charged Regeneration Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disablespeed: Set to true/on to disable Charged Speed Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disabletotem: Set to true/on to disable Charged Totem Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.disablewater: Set to true/on to disable Charged Water Breathing Charm
chargedcharms.configuration.glowupcharge: Number of charges for the Charged Glow Up Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.glowupdurati: Duration in seconds for the Charged Glow Up Charm effect.
chargedcharms.configuration.regencharges: Number of charges for the Charged Regeneration Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.regenduratio: Duration in seconds for the Charged Regeneration Charm effect.
chargedcharms.configuration.regenpercent: Low health percentage to trigger Charged Regeneration Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.rendering.de: Controls client rendering of Charged Charms.
chargedcharms.configuration.showcharms.d: Show Charged Charm on player chest.
chargedcharms.configuration.speedcharges: Number of charges for the Charged Speed Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.speedcooldow: Cooldown in seconds for the Charged Speed Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.speedduratio: Duration in seconds for the Charged Speed Charm effect.
chargedcharms.configuration.title: Charged Charms
chargedcharms.configuration.totemcharges: Number of charges for the Charged Totem Charm and Charged Enchanted Totem Charm.
chargedcharms.configuration.tweaks.descr: General tweaks for individual Charged Charms.
chargedcharms.configuration.tweaks.name: Tweaks
chargedcharms.configuration.waterbreathi: Number of charges for the Charged Water Breathing Charm.
